sb_prompt: DISCUSS THE WEATHER.   WHAT HAS IT BEEN LIKE IN YOUR AREA?   HAS IT BEEN TYPICAL FOR THIS TIME OF YEAR?  COMPARE IT WITH THE OTHER CALLER'S WEATHER.
raw_output:
ParticipantA: Hello!
ParticipantB: Hello! How are you doing today?
ParticipantA: I'm doing well, thanks for asking. How about you?
ParticipantB: I'm doing pretty good too, thanks. So, what brings you to call today?
ParticipantA: I was just wondering if you have had a chance to check out the weather lately?
ParticipantB: Oh, yes! The weather has been quite interesting lately, I must say. Have you been keeping up with it as well?
ParticipantA: Yes, I have. It's been a bit unusual where I live as well.
ParticipantB: Really? What kind of weather have you been experiencing?
ParticipantA: We've been having some pretty intense thunderstorms and heavy rain showers, which is unusual for this time of year.
ParticipantB: Yeah, I've noticed the same thing here too. In fact, we've been having some flash flooding in some areas due to the heavy rain.
ParticipantA: Wow, that's really intense. Has it been typical for this time of year where you are?
ParticipantB: No, not really. In fact, we've been experiencing much more rain than usual.
ParticipantA: That's the same here as well. It's been a bit of a challenge to keep everything dry and safe.
ParticipantB: I can only imagine. Well, at least we're both experiencing some interesting weather.
ParticipantA: Yes, that's for sure. It's definitely not boring around here lately.
ParticipantB: Definitely not. Well, it looks like we're both in the same boat when it comes to the weather.
ParticipantA: Yes, it seems like it. It's definitely been an interesting ride lately.
ParticipantB: Yes, it has. But I guess that's just Mother Nature for you.
ParticipantA: Absolutely. Well, it was nice talking to you about the weather.
ParticipantB: Same here. Take care and stay safe!
ParticipantA: You too! Bye.
